description: Key US pharmaceutical regulatory and policy milestones, 1995-2025

milestones.label: FDA Modernization Act
milestones.detail: Streamlines drug approval; creates fast-track designation

milestones.label: DSCSA Precursor (PDMA Amendments)
milestones.detail: Tightens wholesale drug distribution requirements

milestones.label: Medicare Modernization Act
milestones.detail: Creates Part D; shifts reimbursement dynamics

milestones.label: FDAAA (FDA Amendments Act)
milestones.detail: Grants FDA post-market safety authority; REMS created

milestones.label: Affordable Care Act Draft
milestones.detail: ACA biosimilar pathway (BPCIA) introduced in Congress

milestones.label: ACA Signed into Law
milestones.detail: Biosimilar approval pathway; 340B expansion

milestones.label: FDASIA (Safety & Innovation Act)
milestones.detail: Drug shortage notification mandate; breakthrough therapy

milestones.label: Drug Supply Chain Security Act
milestones.detail: DSCSA mandates track-and-trace serialization

milestones.label: First US Biosimilar Approved
milestones.detail: Zarxio (filgrastim-sndz) by Sandoz; biosimilar era begins

milestones.label: FDA Drug Competition Action Plan
milestones.detail: Gottlieb pushes generic approvals to combat prices

milestones.label: SUPPORT Act (Opioid Crisis)
milestones.detail: Accelerates controlled substance shortage protocols

milestones.label: CREATES Act
milestones.detail: Blocks REMS abuse that delays generic competition

milestones.label: Executive Order on Drug Imports
milestones.detail: Trump EO allows state-level Canadian drug importation

milestones.label: EO on Essential Medicines Manufacturing
milestones.detail: Orders domestic API production for essential drugs

milestones.label: Biden Supply Chain EO 14017
milestones.detail: 100-day review of pharma supply chain vulnerabilities

milestones.label: Inflation Reduction Act
milestones.detail: Medicare drug price negotiation; Part D cap

milestones.label: BIOSECURE Act Introduced
milestones.detail: Targets Chinese biotech firms; reshoring push

milestones.label: DSCSA Enforcement Begins
milestones.detail: Full serialization compliance required Nov 2023

milestones.label: First Medicare Negotiated Prices
milestones.detail: CMS announces prices for first 10 drugs

milestones.label: BIOSECURE Act Takes Effect
milestones.detail: Federal contracts barred from designated Chinese CDMOs
